---
title: "Air Quality Warning Statistics"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    echo: false
    keep-hidden: true
---

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Plot

```{ojs}
Plot.plot({
    x: { label: "Region" },
    y: { label: "Count" },
    marks: [
    Plot.barY(regionCount, { x: "name", y: "value" }),
    Plot.text(regionCount, { x: "name", y: "value", text: "value", dy: -5 })
  ]
})
```

## Data

```{ojs}
Inputs.table(regionCount, {
  columns: [
    "name",
    "value"
  ],    
  header: {
    name: "Air Zone Region",
    value: "Count"
  }
})  
```

:::

```{ojs}
data = FileAttachment("2025-regions.csv").csv({ typed: true })
```

```{ojs}
d3 = require("d3@7")

regionCount = Array.from(
  d3.rollup(data, v => v.length, d => d.selRegionsIDs),
  ([name, value]) => ({ name, value })
);

```
